overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night in a futuristic city. The camera moves through a covered plaza with neon billboards, transitions through crowds of pedestrians, and follows characters along elevated glass walkways between massive skyscrapers, ending at a monumental plaza with giant monoliths.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with digital billboards

events.description: approaching and entering a dense crowd of pedestrians
turning right toward a concrete wall and stairway

agents.ego_description: moving through a covered plaza, navigating between bench structures and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket and white pants walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking along the left side of the plaza

entered.detail: large overhanging concrete roof structure covering the plaza area
massive illuminated advertisement displaying KIROSHI brand with cybernetic imagery
dark rectangular geometric bench structures arranged throughout the plaza
transparent glass safety barriers lining the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-sheltered urban plaza with wet reflective concrete surfaces and massive digital billboards illuminating the scene. The camera moves forward past geometric bench structures, approaching a moderate crowd of pedestrians walking in various directions. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy rain visible beyond the shelter and neon advertisements casting colored light on the surroundings.

events.description: camera switches to third-person perspective following a character
ascending stairs alongside a concrete wall

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian character up a flight of stairs along a sloped concrete wall

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket and purple pants ascending the stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: massive sloped concrete wall with embedded linear lighting strips
wide concrete stairs leading to an upper elevated walkway
transparent glass-enclosed walkway visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a third-person perspective following a character ascending a staircase alongside a massive angled concrete wall. The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves upward, leaving the open plaza behind. Sparse pedestrians are visible ahead as the camera approaches a glass-enclosed elevated walkway with the city skyline visible through the haze.

events.description: entering fully enclosed glass walkway with transparent floor sections
overtaking a pedestrian while continuing along the walkway

agents.ego_description: following a character in business attire along a high-rise glass walkway with city views below

notable_agents.action: bald character in white shirt and dark vest walking ahead on the glass walkway
character in bright green pants walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible through the rain and haze in the distance
KIROSHI advertisement reappearing on a distant building facade
illuminated architectural lighting on distant skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a character along a sleek elevated walkway with transparent glass flooring and railings, revealing the city depths below. The environment is enclosed but offers panoramic views of the rain-soaked futuristic skyline with palm trees visible through the atmospheric haze. The camera overtakes another pedestrian while massive digital billboards and neon-lit buildings dominate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental plaza with giant monoliths and holographic displays

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the mega-building facade
approaching the large monolithic structures at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking toward massive monolithic structures while looking up at the surrounding mega-architecture

notable_agents.action: figure in white clothing standing near the entrance to the monolith structure

entered.detail: colossal building with distinctive yellow structural elements and dense window arrays
tall dark stone monoliths with glowing blue base lighting arranged in a row
large animated holographic projection of a koi fish swimming through the air

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a dramatic plaza dominated by massive dark monoliths with ethereal blue lighting at their bases. The camera pans upward to reveal a staggering mega-building facade with yellow industrial scaffolding and countless illuminated windows. A holographic fish swims through the rainy air on the left, while the camera moves toward a distant figure standing before the monolithic entrance, creating a sense of monumental scale and cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-sheltered urban plaza into the towering heights of a monumental cyberpunk district. It begins by gliding across wet, reflective concrete beneath massive digital billboards, moving past geometric benches and through a crowd of pedestrians. As the camera ascends a staircase alongside a massive angled concrete wall, the open plaza gives way to a sleek, glass-enclosed elevated walkway that reveals the rain-soaked city depths and distant palm trees through an atmospheric haze. The scene then shifts from the transparent corridor toward a dramatic plaza dominated by dark monoliths with ethereal blue lighting at their bases. Finally, the camera pans upward to reveal a staggering mega-building facade with yellow industrial scaffolding and a holographic fish swimming through the rainy air, closing on a distant figure standing before the monolithic entrance.
